sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the yellow shape
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    print("Changes in right panel top section:")
    for i in range(3, 31):
        before_row = before[i][38:56]
        after_row = after[i][38:56]
        if before_row != after_row:
            print(f"Row {i}: '{before_row}' -> '{after_row}'")
    print("\nChanges in left panel:")
    for i in range(0, 64):
        before_row = before[i][0:32]
        after_row = after[i][0:32]
        if before_row != after_row:
            print(f"Row {i}: '{before_row}' -> '{after_row}'")
    print("\nChanges in bar patterns (right panel):")
    for i in range(32, 51):
        before_row = before[i][38:56]
        after_row = after[i][38:56]
        if before_row != after_row:
            print(f"Row {i}: '{before_row}' -> '{after_row}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
